LanguageData.AIPortraits_FramingPortraitTooltip: Set framing style to standard bust-up portrait.
LanguageData.AIPortraits_FramingBodyshotTooltip: Set framing style to full-length bodyshot.
LanguageData.AIPortraits_FramingSpecialTooltip: Set framing style to special selfie / thematic scene.
LanguageData.AIPortraits_ToggleVideoOffTooltip: Toggle Video Mode OFF (Show static portrait)
LanguageData.AIPortraits_ToggleVideoOnTooltip: Toggle Video Mode ON (Run Veo 3.1 Lite to animate portrait)
LanguageData.AIPortraits_NoPortraitToAnimateMsg: No portrait image available to animate.
